violations.text: The presence of cockroaches is not controlled as evidenced by dead roaches. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the hoods have an accumulation of grease and other residue. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

The wall juncture behind grill and fryer is lacking a complete seal. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
Tools were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
Alcohol was observed adulterated. Cockroach was observed in the bottle. Alcohol was voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

Food contact surfaces of the following : - (containers, utensils, cutting boards, prep unit) were observed with live roaches. - (grill, tables) were observed with grease and food residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

The presence of cockroaches is not controlled as evidenced by several live roaches throughout kitchen and bar. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the handwashing sink and shelving have an accumulation of cockroach feces. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fryer and shelving have an accumulation grease and food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
The wall junctures behind grill is lacking a complete seal. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
